# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the in-scope branch diff against origin/master, read the changed implementation files and related tests, and found no correctness, safety, or robustness issues to amend. Validation also passed with `cargo test`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --check`.

## Amendments

None.
